ogTitle: Glen Iris vs Glen Mervyn: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Iris and Glen Mervyn.
heading: Glen Iris vs Glen Mervyn — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Iris, Western Australia and Glen Mervyn, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Mervyn has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Glen Iris (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Iris or Glen Mervyn safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Iris has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Glen Mervyn scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Iris scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Mervyn scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Iris or Glen Mervyn?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Mervyn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
